channel.title: Dragonholic Translations — Free Chapters
channel.description: Your favorite place to read Web Novels & Light Novels. Join our community and connect with us by joining our Discord server.

item.title: Transmigrated Into an Ancient Famine Novel as a Scumbag Alpha (ABO, GL) — Chapter 169
item.description: Chapter 169 The next morning, the little one woke up early. Ye Tan excitedly ate breakfast with Ye Qing and Jiang Jinhuang, and then the three boarded a carriage. On their kid’s first day of school, Ye Qing and Jiang Jinhuang personally took her. In the carriage, Ye Tan was thrilled, “Mama, is my little…

item.title: Dressed as the Scumbag Alpha Mom of the Tragic Female Lead (ABO, GL) — Chapter 166
item.description: Chapter 166 Whether due to extreme shock or inflamed wounds, Jiang Weizao developed a fever in the middle of the night. Fortunately, Gu Lingjun and Jiang Chuxie stayed with her, noticing her condition promptly. For safety, they didn’t take her to a hospital, instead calling a family doctor. To avoid any ties to Gao Yuanxun,…

item.title: After the Top Idol Omega and I Started Living Together — Chapter 132
item.description: Chapter 132 In the early morning, clouds gathered at the horizon with signs of snow, but now they completely vanished. Sunlight poured straight in, spreading brightness to every corner, making the entire space clearly visible. Naturally, this included the pair of shadows leaning close together at the bedside. People inside and outside the room never…

item.title: Accidentally Marked My Ex’s Crush, the Ice-Cold Goddess O — Chapter 131 Danger
item.description: Chapter 131: Danger "You two are not allowed to go back tonight. Stay here. When you’ve thought things through, come talk to me. You can leave only after I agree," Fu Xiyu said. Gu Mushi heard this and secretly shivered. Since graduating high school, she hadn’t been afraid of anyone. Even facing leaders, she was…
